'''Swedlan''' was one of the three primary [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that made up the [[Pimbrellan League]]. Located in [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], Its [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] could not sustain most forms of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] life. Sealed domed [[City/Legends|cities]] were built in underground cave systems, financed with the profits gained from trade with nearby [[Dolstan]].
